name: bar-chart
title: BarChart
description: Horizontal bars that grow from 0 to their value on SPRING_SMOOTH, staggered. Single-accent palette: the largest bar earns the dusty-rose accent, every other bar sits in --onda-dim. Calm, no overshoot, one focal moment.
pickWhen: comparing 3–8 discrete values where the winner is the story. Use `line-chart` for trends, `pie-reveal` for a single share.
